2019: 6% yield increase in tolls
2019: 4% yield increase in fares
2017: 4% yield increase in tolls
2017: 4% yield increase in fares
Recommendation: 6% Revenue Yield Scenario

payload.raw_value_text: flat 7.08% increase to all current rates

payload.description: Carpool elimination reduces operating expenses by $1.4M per year
18,000 active carpool users in 2019
13,000 active carpool users in 2020
Potential additional revenue: $2M from carpool elimination

tool_args.label: No Public Comments Received on Toll Policy Options

payload.claim_text: The Public Notice and State Register sought public comment on the following toll policy options between December 16, 2020 and February 16, 2021. No public comments were received.
payload.description: No public comments were received on toll policy options

payload.claim_text: Introduce New Mid-Tier Rate. Incentivizes customer to mount tag appropriately. Reduces operating expenses. Opportunities for alternative payment methods (e.g., apps & 3rd party). Potential Revenues: Additional $12M-$24M (75%-50% adoption of tags).
payload.description: Recommendation to introduce new Mid-Tier Rate

payload.claim_text: Eliminate Verrazzano-Narrows Bridge Carpool Discount. Current carpool toll is $1.70 each way (SI residents only). Carpool elimination reduces operating expenses by $1.4M per year. Eliminates complex program from a pre-cashless environment. 18,000 active users in 2019 and 13,000 active users in 2020. Potential additional revenue: $2M.
payload.description: Recommendation to eliminate VNB Carpool Discount

tool_args.label: Cross Bay Bridge Full Rebate for Rockaway/Broad Channel Residents

payload.claim_text: The Cross Bay Bridge toll would continue to be fully rebated for Rockaway/Broad Channel residents
payload.description: Cross Bay Bridge toll continues to be fully rebated for Rockaway/Broad Channel residents
